positive: A maximalist, stylized illustration featuring a celestial forest scene. The composition is perfectly symmetrical and centered, using bold, clean silhouettes of trees, moons, and floating geometric shapes. The color palette is deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted with brilliant gold accents and cream highlights. The style is inspired by Art Nouveau and Japanese woodblock prints, optimized for printing on fabric. Focus on strong, high-contrast edges and intricate, flowing patterns (doodle-style filling) within the negative space. The overall mood is magical and ethereal.
negative: blur, noise, grain, watermark, signature, text, logo, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, copyright, messy, photo, realism
